title: Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Uttara Kannada District of Karnataka state in India.
overview.description: Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Uttara Kannada District of Karnataka state in India. The sanctuary covers an area of 866.41 km2 (334.52 sq mi). Along with neighboring Anshi National Park (339.87 square kilometres (83,980 acres)), the sanctuary was declared part of the Anshi Dandeli Tiger Reserve in 2006. Karnataka state government has officially notified the Dandeli Elephant Reserve under Project Elephant on 4 June 2015.

topPlaces.name: Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in the Western Ghats, in Khanapur Taluk of Belgavi District near Jamboti Village, Karnataka state, India. This 19,042.58 ha (73.5238 mi2) of Tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests forest area was long awaiting to be a wild life sanctuary and finally declared in December 2011.

topPlaces.name: Ambewadi, Khanapur
topPlaces.description: Ambewadi is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located 31 km south of the Belgaum district headquarters, and 517 km from the state capital of Bangalore.

topPlaces.name: Akheti
topPlaces.description: Akheti is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Supa taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Mendil
topPlaces.description: Mendil is a village in Belgaum district of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Teregali
topPlaces.description: Teregali is a village in Belgaum district of Karnataka, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Belagavi Airport (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (53 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dandeli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhimgad Wildlife Sanctuary, Ambewadi, Khanapur, Akheti, Mendil, Teregali.
